name: io.github.Pawansingh3889/sql-steward
title: sql-steward
description: The agent never writes SQL: queries compile from a semantic layer you control, PII refused first.

environmentVariables.name: SQL_STEWARD_DB_URL
environmentVariables.description: SQLAlchemy URL of the database to read (read-only account recommended)

environmentVariables.name: SQL_STEWARD_LAYER
environmentVariables.description: Path to the semantic layer YAML (default: semantic.yaml)
